violations.text: Establishment is vacuum packaging tuna without approval. Establishment to cease ROP packaging until HACCP plan has been submitted, reviewed and approved by RIDOH Center for Food Protection. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
The hand-washing sink in the restroom was lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
The hand-washing sink at the bar was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (lettuce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (hotel pans) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Sauces were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Inspector observed small flies (live) near ware washing area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. PIC ordered at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the 3 bay sink has an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The upstairs bar handwashing sink is in poor repair. Leak observed. Handwashing sink must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
